citations.narrative:
During inspection and review of the contingency plan, the new general manager hired on 14 January 2026 had not trained
on the contingency plan yet. Exhibitors must provide training for their personnel regarding their roles and responsibilities
as outlined in the plan. For employees hired after the contingency plan is in place, training must be conducted within 30
days of their start date. The general manager is an integral part of the facilities emergency plan and should have been
trained on it within the required timeline in order to ensure that in an emergency the animals' welfare is safeguarded.
Corrected during inspection on 13 March, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the general manager.
n

narrative:
2.134(c) 
   
Contingency planning. 
During inspection and review of the contingency plan, the new general manager hired on 14 January 2026 had not trained 
on the contingency plan yet. Exhibitors must provide training for their personnel regarding their roles and responsibilities 
as outlined in the plan. For employees hired after the contingency plan is in place, training must be conducted within 30 
days of their start date. The general manager is an integral part of the facilities emergency plan and should have been 
trained on it within the required timeline in order to ensure that in an emergency the animals' welfare is safeguarded. 
 
Corrected during inspection on 13 March, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the general manager. 
 
 n
